title: OptiCore
description: A lightweight optimization pack for Minecraft Fabric — delivering maximum performance without compromising vanilla features or gameplay.
body:
# ⚙️ OptiCore — Fabric Optimization Pack
A lightweight optimization pack for Minecraft Fabric — delivering maximum performance without compromising vanilla features or gameplay. This is an optimization pack built for players who want the best of both worlds: significant performance gains with zero compromise on the vanilla experience.
Whether you're playing on a low-end machine, chasing higher FPS, or running a multiplayer server — OptiCore is built for you.

## Features:

- Performance & FPS Boost — Significantly improved performance and higher FPS, thanks to a carefully selected set of optimization mods.
- Shader Support — Enhance your game's visuals with beautiful shaders, included and ready to use out of the box.
- Dynamic Lighting — Light up your surroundings by holding torches and other light sources, without placing them down.
- Quality of Life — A collection of small but impactful improvements: better chat history, faster quitting, improved advancement screen, shulker box previews, zoom and more.
- Fully Vanilla Compatible — No new items, blocks, or mechanics. Play on any vanilla server without issues.
Performance Monitoring — Built-in profiling tools to track and diagnose performance in real time.
- OptiFine Parity — Enjoy features you know from OptiFine — capes, custom GUIs, custom skyboxes, connected textures, and more — all without the performance cost.

## mods:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## 🚀 Performance

- **Sodium** + Sodium Extra — Massively improved rendering engine & extra settings
- **Lithium** — General-purpose game logic optimization
- **ImmediatelyFast** — Speeds up immediate mode rendering
- **FerriteCore** — Significant memory usage reduction
- **BadOptimizations** — Various small optimizations
- **Concurrent Chunk Management Engine** — Faster, async chunk loading
- **Dynamic FPS** — Reduces resource usage when tabbed out
- **Entity Culling + More Culling** — Skips rendering non-visible entities & objects
- **Debugify** — Fixes dozens of vanilla bugs affecting performance
- **Krypton** — Optimizes the networking stack, reducing latency
- **ModernFix** — General-purpose optimizations, complements Lithium
- **Noisium** — Speeds up world generation
- **Packet Fixer** — Fixes issues with large network packets

## 🎨 Visuals

- **Iris Shaders** — Shader support with minimal performance cost
- **Complementary Shaders** - Reimagined — Beautiful default shader pack (included)
- **[EMF] Entity Model Features** — Custom entity model support
- **[ETF] Entity Texture Features** — Custom entity texture support
- **LambDynamicLights **— Dynamic lighting without compromising FPS
- **Cubes Without Borders** — Removes borders between same-type blocks
- **Zoomify** — Smooth, customizable zoom
- **BetterGrassify** — Improved grass rendering, similar to OptiFine's better grass
- **Capes** — Supports OptiFine, Minecraft, and LabyMod capes
- **OptiGUI** — Custom GUI textures via resource packs, like OptiFine
- **Skyboxify** — Custom skybox support via resource packs
- **Puzzle** — Adds OptiFine-like resource pack features
- **Fabrishot** — High-resolution screenshot support

## 🛠️ Quality of Life

- **Better Advancements + Paginated Advancements** — Improved advancement screen
- **Better Mount HUD** — Shows mount health & jump bar clearly
- **Mod Menu** — In-game mod list & config access
- **Reese's Sodium Options** — Better UI for Sodium settings
- **More Chat History** — Longer chat history
- **Emoji Type** — Type emojis directly in chat
- **Language Reload** — Reload language without restarting
- **FastQuit** — Quit to menu instantly without waiting
- **Remove Reloading Screen** — Skip the resource pack reload screen
- **Shulker Box Tooltip** — Preview shulker box contents on hover
- **CalcMod** — In-game calculator
- **Crash Assistant** — Helpful crash diagnostics

## 🔒 Privacy & Security

- **No Chat Reports** — Removes chat reporting system
- **Chat Reporting Helper** — Clarifies reporting status in chat


## ✅ What OptiCore does NOT change

No new items, blocks, or mechanics
100% vanilla-compatible worlds and servers
No gameplay modifications — pure performance & QoL

</details>

⚠️ Note for version 26.1.1 - 26.1.2 : Due to major technical changes introduced in Minecraft 26.1, several mods have not yet been updated for this version. The following mods are temporarily unavailable in this release:

**26.1.1:**

- **Emoji Type** — replaced with Chat Emojis

**26.1.2:**

- **Emoji Type** — replaced with Chat Emojis

These mods will be re-added as soon as compatible versions are released.

### Thanks for downloading OptiCore ❤️

Thanks for creabit for all of the small help with the project
